Algorythmic Explorations

Interactive essays on gravity, light, matter, and music — built from first principles, running live in your browser.

Start with gravity → Browse the essays

The galaxy behind the title is not a video. It is twenty thousand bodies pulling on each other, simulated by your graphics card right now — and everything on this site works that way. No screenshots, no recordings: every figure is a live simulation you can drag, poke, and break, built up from first principles one essay at a time.

Contact · Source on GitHub

Simulations, prose, and mistakes — all open source.
